# Contributing to Aiden

The canonical contributing guide lives at the repository root:
**[/CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)** — start there.

Aiden is **AGPL-3.0** open source, maintained by [Taracod](https://taracod.com).
By opening a pull request you agree to the Contributor License Agreement in
[.github/CLA.md](CLA.md); the CLA Assistant bot will prompt you to sign it on
your first PR.
